Misconfigurations.Title: S3 Access Block Should Restrict Public Bucket
Misconfigurations.Description: S3 bucket does not have a corresponding public access block
Misconfigurations.Message: Public access is not blocked for bucket aws_s3_bucket.data
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Add a public access block to the S3 bucket

Misconfigurations.Title: Ensure IMDSv2 is Required
Misconfigurations.Description: EC2 instance does not require IMDSv2
Misconfigurations.Message: Instance aws_instance.web does not require IMDSv2
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Set http_tokens to required in metadata options

Misconfigurations.Title: IAM Policy Should Not Use Wildcards
Misconfigurations.Description: IAM policy uses a wildcard action
Misconfigurations.Message: Policy document uses wildcard for actions
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Specify explicit actions instead of wildcards

Misconfigurations.Title: Security Group Unrestricted Ingress
Misconfigurations.Description: Security group allows unrestricted SSH ingress
Misconfigurations.Message: Security group aws_security_group.allow_ssh has unrestricted ingress to port 22
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Restrict ingress to specific CIDR blocks

Misconfigurations.Title: S3 Bucket Encryption
Misconfigurations.Description: S3 bucket encryption is not configured
Misconfigurations.Message: Bucket aws_s3_bucket.data does not have encryption enabled
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Configure server-side encryption for the bucket

Misconfigurations.Title: EC2 Public IP
Misconfigurations.Description: EC2 instance should not have a public IP
Misconfigurations.Message: Instance aws_instance.web has a public IP

Misconfigurations.Title: S3 Bucket Logging
Misconfigurations.Description: S3 bucket should have access logging enabled
Misconfigurations.Message: Bucket aws_s3_bucket.data does not have logging enabled

Misconfigurations.Title: S3 Bucket Versioning
Misconfigurations.Description: S3 bucket should have versioning enabled
Misconfigurations.Message: Bucket versioning not enabled for aws_s3_bucket.data

Misconfigurations.Title: EC2 Detailed Monitoring
Misconfigurations.Description: EC2 instance should have detailed monitoring
Misconfigurations.Message: Instance aws_instance.web does not have detailed monitoring

Misconfigurations.Title: S3 Block Public ACLs
Misconfigurations.Description: Check passed for public ACL block
